title: Yilani Öldürseler
overview: Esme, the most beautiful woman in her village, is in love with Abbas, the valiant young man of the village, but she is married to the village lord Halim. When Abbas kills Halim, the people of the village lynch Esme and pressures Esme's son to kill her.

trailers.title: Yilani Öldürseler Türkan Soray Orjinal yesilcam sinema Fragman Talat Bulut,Ahmet Mekin ,Yaman Okay
